mapper.select: select biz_tag as bizTag, max_id as maxId, step, update_time as updateTime from id_segment where biz_tag = #{bizTag} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into id_segment (biz_tag, max_id, step, update_time) values (#{bizTag}, #{maxId}, #{step}, now())
mapper.update: update id_segment set max_id = max_id + step, update_time = now() where biz_tag = #{bizTag}
